auth.subtitle: Access your school's admin, staff, teacher, and finance workspace.
auth.apiUnavailable: Cannot reach the sign-in server. From the project root run npm run dev (starts API + web). Ensure Docker is running: npm run db:up.
auth.forgotPasswordSubtitle: Enter your school and email or phone. We will send a reset link if an account exists.
auth.resetEmailSent: If an account exists for that identifier, a reset link has been sent.
auth.resetPasswordSubtitle: Enter the reset token from your email and a new password.
auth.resetTokenRequired: Enter the reset token from your email.
auth.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 10 characters.
auth.resetFailed: Could not reset password. The token may be invalid or expired.

platformAuth.subtitle: Manage tenant schools, settings, and feature access.
platformAuth.apiUnavailable: Cannot reach the sign-in server. From the project root run npm run dev (starts API + web). Ensure Docker is running: npm run db:up.

platformTenants.title: Tenant management
platformTenants.description: Create schools and control their settings and feature access.
platformTenants.slugInvalid: Use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.
platformTenants.settingsMissing: No settings yet — save the form below to create them.
platformTenants.featuresHelp: Toggle optional modules and capabilities for this tenant.
platformTenants.createHelp: The school owner receives an email with their login email and password. Leave password blank to generate a secure temporary password automatically.
platformTenants.ownerPasswordMin: Password must be at least 10 characters.
platformTenants.createSuccess: {school} was created. Login credentials were emailed to {email}.

overview.title: Overview
overview.description: A live snapshot of your school's configuration and recent activity.
overview.teacherDescription: Your assigned classrooms and students at a glance.
overview.setupChecklistHelp: Complete these steps to get your school ready for daily operations.
overview.checklistFinance: Configure fee items and enrollment plans

academicSetup.title: Academic Setup
academicSetup.description: Configure subjects, grades, classrooms, terms, and bulk import/export.
academicSetup.subjectsHelp: Define subjects and assign them to grades for an academic year — no separate mapping step.
academicSetup.subjectsPageHelp: Configure subjects offered across all grade levels.
academicSetup.subjectsToolbarHelp: Configure subjects offered across all grade levels. Assign a colour, icon, and specify applicable grades.
academicSetup.yearsAdminHelp: Manage academic years and choose which year is active for the whole school.
academicSetup.yearGradesMovedHelp: Grades and classrooms are managed on the Grades & Classrooms tab for the working academic year.
academicSetup.drillDownHelp: View academic year dates and activation status.
academicSetup.termsHelp: Define term periods within each academic year.
academicSetup.toolsHelp: Export or import master data for grades and subjects.
academicSetup.gradesClassroomsHelp: Configure grade levels and their classrooms for the working academic year.
academicSetup.gradesClassroomsNeedYear: Activate an academic year before configuring grades and classrooms.

academics.title: School Structure
academics.description: Configure the building blocks of your school year, one area at a time.
academics.structureHelp: Browse grades and rooms for the working academic year. Roster, attendance, and learning live on each room page.
academics.structureEmptyHelp: Activate an academic year before setting up grades and rooms.
academics.structureNoGrades: Add grades for this year to start building rooms.
academics.structureNoRooms: No rooms yet for this grade.
academics.structureNoStudents: No students assigned to this room yet.
academics.gradebookComingSoon: Gradebook for this grade is coming soon.
academics.leaderboardComingSoon: Leaderboard for this grade is coming soon.
academics.deleteClassroomHelp: This archives the classroom. Students and history are kept, but the room will no longer appear in the active structure.
academics.subjectNotFound: Subject not found for this classroom.
academics.noMaterialsYet: No materials uploaded for this subject yet.
academics.assignmentsHelp: Linked to this classroom and subject.
academics.examsHelp: Monthly and term exams are managed under Exams & Grading.
academics.yearsAdminHelp: Manage academic years and choose which year is active for the whole school.
academics.classroomWrongYear: This classroom belongs to another academic year. Switch the working year or open Structure for the current year.
academics.gradesHelp: Each grade accepts an age range and teaches designated subjects for the selected academic year. Classrooms (Room A, Room B, …) are variants of a grade.
academics.classroomsSetupHelp: Configure classroom variants for each grade and academic year. Assign students from the year drill-down, or manage daily roster from Classrooms.
academics.classroomsYearDrillBanner: Tip: use Academic Years drill-down for year-scoped setup. Daily roster and attendance live under Classrooms in the sidebar.
academics.classroomRosterSetupHelp: Assign students here during setup. For attendance and daily roster, open the classroom under Classrooms.
academics.subjectsHelp: Define subjects and assign them to grades for an academic year — no separate mapping step.
academics.noSubjectsYet: Add subjects first, then assign them here.
academics.noGradesYet: Add grades first, then assign them here.
academics.drillDownHelp: Open an academic year to manage grades, classrooms, and student assignments.
academics.subject: Subject
academics.yearFormHelp: New years start as draft unless this is your first year. Use the active switch to choose the working year for enrollments, finance, and other modules.
academics.singleYearHelp: Only one academic year can be active at a time. Turning a year on will turn the current working year off.
academics.noWorkingYear: No active academic year configured. Turn on a year below to enable enrollments, fee plans, and other modules.
academics.activateYearBody: Set {year} as the working year. Enrollments, fee plans, classrooms, and other modules will use this year.
academics.activateYearReplaceBody: Set {year} as the working year and deactivate {current}. All operational modules will switch to the new year.
academics.deactivateYearBody: Turn off {year}. There will be no working year until you activate another one. Operational modules may be unavailable.
academics.exportHelp: Download grades and subjects as a JSON file.
academics.importHelp: Paste a master-data JSON document to bulk-create grades and subjects.

people.title: People
people.description: Staff profiles, login access, and teaching assignments in one place.
people.directoryDescription: Teachers, office staff, and students in one place.
people.studentsDirectoryDescription: Students, guardians, and households in one place.
people.studentsTabHelp: Browse enrolled students and open profiles.
people.teamHelp: Add staff with login and role in one step. Edit a teacher to set homeroom, grade chief, and subject assignments.
people.addTeamHelp: Creates the staff record and login account together. Teachers can set teaching assignments on the Teaching tab.
people.editTeamHelp: Update profile, access role, and teaching assignments.
people.wizardStepHelp_profile: Who is this person and how do we reach them.
people.wizardStepHelp_access: Whether to create a login account for this person.
people.wizardStepHelp_assignments: Pick the grades this teacher works in, then chief, homeroom, and subjects.
people.gradeMembershipLabel: Which grade(s) does this teacher belong to?
people.gradeMembershipHelp: This drives the chief, homeroom, and subject options below.
people.noGradesAvailable: No grades are set up for the active academic year yet.
people.selectGradeFirst: Select at least one grade to continue.
people.gradeChiefToggle: Is this person a grade chief?
people.homeroomToggle: Is this person a homeroom teacher?
people.subjectsTaughtLabel: Which subjects does this teacher teach?
people.subjectsTaughtHelp: Sourced from the curriculum of the selected grade(s). Applies to every classroom in those grades.
people.noClassroomsForGrades: No classrooms exist for the selected grade(s).
people.noSubjectsForGrades: No subjects are mapped to the selected grade(s).
people.chiefConflictWarning: {grade} already has a grade chief: {teacher}. Saving will reassign it.
people.chiefConflictConfirm: These grades already have a chief and will be reassigned to this person: {items}.
people.createLoginHelp: Send login credentials when email is provided
people.roleReadOnly: Role is managed by your administrator.
people.noRolesAvailable: No roles available. Add or enable roles in Settings → User Roles.
people.rolesAdvancedHelp: Default roles are assigned automatically by person type. Seed roles for new tenants or inspect permissions here.
people.inviteHelp: When you provide an email, we create an active account and email login credentials (email + temporary password). Phone-only invites stay pending until the person signs in another way.
people.teacherAssignmentsHelp: Assign grade chief, homeroom, and subject-teaching roles. Each classroom has one homeroom teacher; each grade has one chief per academic year; subject teachers can span multiple classrooms.
people.selectTeacherToEdit: Select a teacher to view and edit their assignments.
people.gradeChiefHelp: Oversees all classrooms in a grade for the selected academic year.
people.homeroomHelp: Owns the classroom for attendance, leave requests, and day-to-day management.
people.subjectTeacherHelp: Assign this teacher to teach a subject in a classroom. Subjects available per classroom come from Academic Setup (year → grade → subjects).
people.subject: Subject
people.staffHelp: Legacy copy removed — use Team above.

students.title: Students
students.registerHelp: Enter student details, then guardian and household — all saved together on submit.
students.registerGuardianSkipHelp: You can link a guardian and household later from the student profile.
students.registerHouseholdJoinGuardian: Student will join {name} — the guardian's existing household.
students.registerHouseholdCreateGuardian: A new household will be created for {name} (or join siblings if they already have one).
students.registerHouseholdNoneHelp: Student will be created without a household. Sibling discounts require a household link.
students.registerHouseholdSkipGuardian: Add a guardian first to assign a household, or skip household for now.
students.enrollCeremonyHint: Enrollment creates classroom placement, fee preview, invoice, and optional payment in one step. Use the enrollment ceremony instead of quick assign.
students.editProfileHelp: Update student details and guardian contact information.
students.noSubjectsThisTerm: No subjects assigned for this grade yet.
students.guardianContactHelp: Contact details shown on the profile — not linked to a login account.
students.deleteStudentHelp: This archives the student record. History is kept, but the student will no longer appear in active lists.
students.deactivateHelp: The student will be marked withdrawn and hidden from active classroom operations.
students.activateHelp: The student will be marked enrolled and available for classroom operations again.
students.enrollmentsHelp: Each enrollment ceremony places the student in a classroom with fee preview and billing. You can enroll this student multiple times for different classrooms or academic years.
students.noEnrollmentsYet: No enrollment records yet. Start an enrollment to place this student in a classroom.
students.familyHelp: Students in the same household share a family group. Sibling discounts apply when another member is enrolled for the same academic year.
students.familyNotLinked: Not linked to a family group yet. Create or join a household so sibling discounts can apply at enrollment.
students.familyNeedsGuardian: Link a guardian first, then create or join a family household.
students.familyNoOtherMembers: No other students in this household yet. Enroll siblings into the same family group to unlock sibling discounts.
students.familySiblingHint: Sibling discounts count other enrolled students in this group for the working academic year.
students.joinFamilyHelp: Search by family name, guardian phone, or another student's name.
students.searchFamilyPlaceholder: Family name, guardian phone, or student name…
students.searchFamilyMin: Type at least 2 characters to search.

guardians.directoryHelp: Parent and guardian contact records. Link guardians to students from student profiles or household pages.
guardians.createHelp: Creates a guardian profile you can link to students and households.
guardians.profileHelp: Contact details and linked students. Guardians do not have login accounts in MVP 1.
guardians.editHelp: Update contact information used on student profiles and household records.
guardians.noLinkedStudents: No students linked to this guardian yet.

households.directoryHelp: Family groups used for sibling discounts and guardian billing. Open a household to see the family tree.
households.createHelp: Start a new family group with a primary guardian, then add students to the tree.
households.detailDescription: Guardians and students in one household — used for sibling discount eligibility.
households.treeHelp: Guardians above, students below. Siblings share this household for enrollment discounts.
households.treeEmpty: No guardians or students in this household yet.
households.siblingHint: Sibling discounts apply when another student in this tree is enrolled for the same academic year.
households.editHelp: Rename the household or change the primary guardian contact.
households.addStudentHelp: Move an existing student into this household for sibling discount eligibility.

admissions.title: Admissions
admissions.description: Track enquiries from first contact through enrollment.
admissions.startEnrollmentHelp: Creates a draft student and opens the enrollment wizard to preview fees, confirm placement, and generate the invoice in one step.

finance.title: Fees & Billing
finance.description: Enrollments, invoices, payments, and collection reports.

feesBilling.searchPlaceholder: Search by student or guardian name…

finance.billingHelp: Enroll students, preview fees, and track invoice status for the working year.
finance.feeStructuresHelp: Configure annual fee components by grade level for enrollment billing.
finance.addComponentHelp: Apply to one or more grade levels. Amounts feed the enrollment fee preview.
finance.noFeeComponents: No fee components for this grade yet.
finance.annualComparisonTitle: Annual fees across all grade levels
finance.applyToGradesHelp: Select one or more grades. The component is added to each.
finance.markRequiredHelp: Required components need admin approval to waive.
finance.paymentPlansHelp: Configure how parents pay school fees.
finance.paymentPlansIntro: Enable plans you want to offer and edit due dates. Active plans appear in the payment recording flow.
finance.createPaymentPlanHelp: Add a new installment schedule parents can choose at enrollment or billing.
finance.editScheduleHelp: Update labels and due dates for each installment.

invoiceList.title: Invoices
invoiceList.searchPlaceholder: Search by invoice no., student or guardian…

paymentList.title: Payments
paymentList.searchPlaceholder: Search by receipt no. or student name…

finance.verifyReasonPlaceholder: e.g. Matched bank transfer ref 12345 on 15 Jun
finance.verifyPendingHelp: Bank and mobile payments must be verified before they count toward the invoice balance.
finance.invoiceClosedNoPayment: This invoice is closed — no further payments can be recorded.
finance.refundReasonPlaceholder: Why this payment is being refunded
finance.refundOnPaymentsTab: To reverse a verified payment, use Refund on the Payments tab.
finance.gradesFeePlanHelp: Select every grade this fee applies to. One plan row is saved for the fee item and amount.
finance.generateMonthlyQueued: Monthly invoice run queued for {month}. Check the worker log for results.
finance.generateMonthlyNone: No new recurring invoices for {month}. {skipped} student(s) already billed or had no billable services.
finance.createInvoiceHelp: Ad-hoc invoice for fees outside standard enrollment or monthly billing.
finance.invoicesGradesHelp: Choose a grade to view invoices, generate monthly recurring bills, or create a one-off invoice. Use Generate here to run billing for all grades at once.
finance.invoicesGradeHelp: Invoices for students enrolled in this grade. Generate creates recurring invoices for this grade only.
finance.generateMonthlyGradeNone: No new recurring invoices for {grade} in {month} — {skipped} student(s) already billed or had no billable services.
finance.invoicesHelp: Enrollment fees come from the enrollment ceremony. Use Create invoice for damage fees, adjustments, and one-off items.
finance.otherChargeHelp: Ad-hoc invoice for fees outside standard enrollment or monthly billing.

salary.title: Salary
salary.description: Pay components and monthly salary records.

settings.description: School configuration, access control, and role permissions.

roles.title: User Roles
roles.noAccess: You need identity.manage permission to configure roles.
roles.emptyHelp: Choose a role from the left to view and configure its permissions.
roles.createRoleHelp: Add a custom role, then assign permissions on the right.
roles.roleDisabledSummary: This role is disabled and cannot be assigned to new team members.
roles.roleHasUsersHint: Assigned to {count, plural, one {# user} other {# users}}. Reassign users before disabling.
roles.cannotDisableRoleWithUsers: This role is assigned to {count, plural, one {# user} other {# users}} and cannot be disabled.
roles.disableRoleConfirm: New team members will no longer be able to select this role. Users already assigned keep their access until you change their role.

team.title: People
team.description: Create staff accounts with roles, email login, and department assignment. Teachers are managed separately.
team.listHelp: Office, finance, and admin roles. Teachers are added under School → Teachers.
team.formHelp: Email and phone are required. A login account is created automatically.
team.loginAutoHelp: A login account will be created using the email address.
team.noRolesAvailable: No roles available. Configure roles in Settings → User Roles.

teachers.title: Teachers
teachers.description: Teacher profiles, certifications, and teaching assignments.
teachers.listHelp: Open a teacher profile to manage teaching capability and classroom placements.
teachers.createHelp: Teachers are created with the Teacher role. Email and phone are required for login. Set teaching assignments on the profile after saving.
teachers.promotionTitleHelp: Professional title shown on the profile (separate from system role).
teachers.qualificationsHelp: Add degrees, certifications, and training credentials.
teachers.editHelp: Update profile, contact details, department, promotion title, and credentials.
teachers.manageTeachingHelp: Set sector scope, subject competencies, grade eligibility, leadership roles, and per-classroom subject assignments.
teachers.sectorHelp: Narrows which grades and classrooms appear below.
teachers.subjectCompetencyHelp: Subjects this teacher is qualified to teach (from Academic Setup).
teachers.noSubjectsCatalog: No subjects in Academic Setup yet.
teachers.gradeEligibilityHelp: Which grade levels this teacher can be placed in.
teachers.noGradesAvailable: No grades are set up yet.
teachers.selectGradeEligibilityFirst: Select at least one eligible grade to assign classrooms.
teachers.gradeChiefHelp: Lead teacher for selected grades this academic year.
teachers.chiefConflictWarning: {grade} already has a grade chief: {teacher}. Saving will reassign it.
teachers.classroomAssignmentsHelp: Assign a subject per classroom. Homeroom is optional and independent.
teachers.gradeChiefOnly: Leadership role only — no classroom rows for this grade.
teachers.noAssignments: No teaching assignments yet. Use Manage teaching to set up this teacher.
teachers.toGradeEmpty: Pending assessments will appear here when exam grading is connected.
teachers.todaysClassesEmpty: Today's timetable will appear here when the timetable module is connected.
teachers.classPerformanceEmpty: Class averages will appear here when grades are published.
teachers.chiefConflictConfirm: These grades already have a chief and will be reassigned: {items}.

departments.title: Departments
departments.description: Organize staff and teachers into departments used across People and Teachers.
departments.listHelp: Departments appear when adding staff or teachers. Disable only when no one is assigned.
departments.formHelp: Department name must be unique within your school.
departments.name: Department name
departments.staffCount: {count, plural, one {# staff member} other {# staff members}}
departments.cannotDisableWithStaff: This department has {count} assigned staff and cannot be disabled.
departments.noAccess: You need hr.manage permission to manage departments.

audit.title: Audit Log
audit.description: Immutable record of sensitive changes across this tenant.

classrooms.title: Classrooms
classrooms.description: Daily classroom operations — attendance by subject, session records, and other room duties for the classes you can access.
classrooms.setupHint: To add classrooms, assign students, or configure grades and subjects, use
classrooms.empty: No classrooms yet. School admins can seed demo data with npm run db:seed.
classrooms.notFound: Classroom not found or you do not have access.
classrooms.subjectsFromGradeHelp: Subjects come from Academic Setup for this classroom's academic year and grade. Assign teachers under Team → edit teacher.
classrooms.rosterHelp: Students enrolled in this classroom. Use Enroll student to add someone through the enrollment form on this page.
classrooms.subject: Subject
classrooms.noSubjects: No subjects linked to this grade for the academic year. Add them in Academic Setup → Grades.
classrooms.noRecords: No student records in this session.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.description: School-wide events, holidays, and key academic dates.
calendar.help: Events appear on the school calendar. Link to an academic year to scope them.

timetable.title: Timetable
timetable.description: Weekly class periods and lesson slots per classroom and teacher.
timetable.subject: Subject
timetable.noPeriods: No periods defined yet. Add periods first.
timetable.help: Conflicts for the same classroom or teacher in a period are blocked automatically.

enrollments.title: Enrollments
enrollments.description: Enroll students with fee preview, discounts, and billing in one ceremony.
enrollments.wizardStep_placement: Choose the student, grade, and classroom for this academic year.
enrollments.wizardStep_placementLocked: Choose a grade and classroom for this student. You can run enrollment again for another classroom or year.
enrollments.wizardStep_feeLines: Review mandatory fees and add optional services.
enrollments.wizardStep_discounts: Review eligible discounts including sibling rules.
enrollments.wizardStep_invoicePreview: Preview the invoice total before saving a draft.
enrollments.mandatoryFeesHint: These fees are included automatically from your enrollment fee plans.
enrollments.noOptionalServices: No optional services configured for this grade.
enrollments.siblingPosition: This enrollment is child position {position} in the household for this year.
enrollments.earlyPaymentPreviewHint: Enable payment collection to preview early-payment discounts before confirm.
enrollments.noDiscounts: No discounts apply to this enrollment.
enrollments.confirmHelp: Confirm creates the invoice, places the student, and starts any recurring services. Mark paid records a cash payment immediately.
enrollments.discountApprovalRequired: A manager with discount approval permission must confirm this enrollment.
enrollments.help: Use the enrollment ceremony to preview fees and discounts together. Only Confirm enrollment creates invoices and payments.
enrollments.legacyBillingNote: This enrollment was approved before unified billing. Continue the ceremony to generate the invoice.
enrollments.noMandatoryFees: No enrollment fee plans are configured for this classroom's academic year and grade. Add plans under Finance → Enrollment fee plans.
enrollments.previewRequired: Fee preview is not available. Go back, choose a classroom with fee plans configured, and try again.

exams.title: Exams & Grading
exams.description: Exam cycles, schedules, results, grading rules, and report cards.
exams.subject: Subject
exams.noStudents: No students enrolled in this classroom.
exams.name: Name

communication.title: Communication
communication.description: Email templates and delivery logs for parent and staff notifications.
communication.subject: Subject
communication.help: Templates are keyed by event (e.g. invoice.created). Provide one per language.

discounts.title: Discounts
discounts.pageDescription: Configure automatic discounts and manual waivers for tuition and fees.
discounts.introText: Active discounts apply when a fee record is created for a qualifying student.
discounts.sheetSubtitle: Create a new discount or waiver type
discounts.stackableHelp: Can combine with other stackable discounts.
discounts.bestWinsHelp: If multiple qualify, only the largest applies.
discounts.scopeHelp: Choose where this discount is evaluated and which fee lines it can reduce.
discounts.billingContextsRequired: Select at least one billing context.
discounts.feeTypesRequired: Select at least one fee type.
discounts.noFeeTypes: Add fee items in Finance first.
discounts.requiresPaymentAtEnrollmentHelp: Only applies when staff confirms enrollment with payment.
discounts.requestOnlyHelp: This discount is never auto-applied. Staff must request and approve it per student.
discounts.requiresDocumentationHelp: Staff should attach proof when requesting this discount.
discounts.notesPlaceholder: Explain when staff should use this rule (not evaluated as logic).
discounts.stackCapNote: Combined discounts are capped at 60% of eligible fees.
discounts.descEarlyPayment: Applied when payment is collected during enrollment confirm.
discounts.appliesToPlaceholder: e.g. Auto · 2nd sibling, Manual, On application
discounts.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe when and how this discount applies
discounts.tuitionDefaultNote: Applies to tuition fee by default.
discounts.infoCallout: Stackable discounts combine; non-stackable discounts compete and the largest wins. Combined discount is capped at 60% of eligible fees.
discounts.descSibling: Applied to the 2nd enrolled sibling's tuition fee.
discounts.descMerit: Awarded to top-performing students each term.
discounts.descStaff: For children of full-time staff members.
discounts.descGeneric: Configured discount rule for qualifying students.
discounts.noRules: No discount rules yet. Add your first discount to get started.
discounts.noAccess: You do not have permission to view discount rules.
discounts.previewLedgerNote: Auto-applied when the fee record is created.
discounts.setupTypeHelpCustom: Name the discount and choose whether it is a percentage or fixed amount off eligible fees.
discounts.setupScopeHelpCustom: Scope the discount to specific fee components, grade levels, and payment plans. Anything left out is billed at full price.
discounts.setupEligibilityHelpCustom: Choose how the discount is applied and any conditions a student must meet.
discounts.setupRulesHelp: Control how this discount combines with other active discounts.
discounts.fixedAmountError: Enter an amount greater than zero.
discounts.feeComponentsHelp: Discount is deducted only from the components you select.
discounts.feeComponentsRequired: Select at least one fee component.
discounts.autoApplyHelp: Applied automatically when a student meets all conditions at billing time.
discounts.requireSiblingMatchHelp: Require a minimum number of enrolled siblings or a specific child position.
discounts.descCustom: Custom discount rule configured for your school.
discounts.typeSiblingDesc: Reduced tuition when siblings are enrolled.
discounts.typeMeritDesc: Awarded to high-performing students after approval.
discounts.typeStaffDesc: For children of full-time staff members.
discounts.typeEarlyPaymentDesc: Applied when payment is collected at enrollment.
